# Open Climb Aviation Academy

> India's premium A320 Pre-Type Rating (Pre-TR) preparation by Capt. Jay Kotecha — FCOM-grounded, airline-standard training that gets CPL holders cockpit-ready before they walk into their A320 Type Rating.

Website: https://www.openclimbaviationacademy.com/
Contact: training.ocaa@gmail.com · WhatsApp +91 94799 59933 · Instagram @jaykotecha_klm

## Who runs it

Capt. Jay Kotecha — Commercial Pilot, A320 Type Rated, Founder. [JAY: short instructor edge / years on type / airline]

## Why Open Climb (differentiators)

- [JAY: instructor edge]
- [JAY: method/FCOM edge — FCOM-grounded, airline-standard flows, scans & MCDU]
- [JAY: format edge — 100% online, live, 1:1 mentorship]
- [JAY: risk/demo edge — free demo, pay only if it's the right fit]

## Courses

- A320 Systems — ₹25,000 · ~20 days · 100% online, live interactive sessions. A320 cockpit layout & controls, all A320 systems, all system limitations.
- Flows & Procedures incl. MCDU — ₹10,000 · ~10 days · 100% online, live. Full cockpit preparation flows, MCDU programming (complete flight), PF & PM duties & task sharing, normal & non-normal checklists, approach briefings.
- A320 Systems + Flows & Procedures (combined / best value) — ₹33,000 · ~25–30 days · 100% online, live. The complete Pre-TR package.
- Career Counselling Session — ₹5,000 · 1-on-1 live session. Personalized aviation career roadmap, flight school & course selection, DGCA requirements, Type Rating & airline prep planning.

## Free demo

Start with a free demo class — try a session before you commit, no obligation. Pay only if it's the right fit.
[JAY: next A320 batch start date · limited seats]
